description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on push and pull requests. Run two parallel jobs: one to build a source package and another to build Sphinx documentation. Both jobs should use ubuntu-latest, check out the code, install uv, and set up Python. The source package job should install dependencies, install the project with uv, run unit tests with pytest, create a source package, and upload it as an artifact. The documentation job should install dependencies, install the project, build Sphinx documentation, and upload it as an artifact.
